title: Send messages to
text: Send messages to Specify where messages are sent if the $PUTMESS_LOG_FILE assignment setting is not specified. Option Description Message Frame Send messages to the application's message frame. Transcript Window Send messages to the application's transcript window. Description If the $PUTMESS_LOG_FILE assignment setting is specified, all messages are always sent to both the message frame and the defined log file. Use this setting to determine what happens if it is not specified. Related Links $PUTMESS_LOG_FILE Copy the message frame contents to one or more files. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
